sections.label: What is RTIH?
sections.textSample: What is RTIH?Ratan Tata Innovation Hub is Andhra Pradesh's flagship initiative to transform the state into a global startup hub. Operating on a Hub-and-Spoke model, RTIH at Amaravati acts as the central hub, supported by five regional centers across Visakhapatnam, Vijayawada, Rajahmundry, Tirupati, and Anantapur. Ratan Tata Innovation Hub Designed toNurture innovation and entrepreneurship across the stateConnect startups with markets, research, and government initiativesDrive cutting-edge innovation in AI, biotech, clean energy, advanced manufacturing, and emerging technologiesPromote inclusivity by supporting women, rural innovators, and underrepresented groups

sections.textSample: Frequently Asked QuestionsEverything you need to know about Ratan Tata Innovation Hub in Andhra Pradesh1. What is Ratan Tata Innovation Hub (RTIH)?−RTIH is a state-wide initiative set up by the Government of Andhra Pradesh to promote innovation, entrepreneurship, and industry–academia collaboration. It acts as a central point of support for startups and innovators.2. What is the vision behind establishing the Ratan Tata Innovation Hub (RTIH)?+The RTIH was established to nurture grassroots innovation, empower entrepreneurs, and create a vibrant startup ecosystem in Andhra Pradesh, with a vision to enable “One Family One Entrepreneur” and honor Ratan Tata’s legacy of innovation and social responsibility.3. Where is RTIH located?+The central hub is set up at Amaravati, with Spokes in Vijayawa

sections.label: Vision
sections.textSample: Ratan Tata Innovation Hub, an initiative under Andhra Pradesh’s Innovation & Startup Policy 2024–2029, is the state’s central platform for innovation, incubation and entrepreneurship. With a hub in Amaravati and spokes in Vijayawada, Anantapur, Visakhapatnam, Tirupati and Rajahmundry RTIH fosters an, inclusive startup ecosystem. It offers expert mentorship, funding support and cutting-edge infrastructure while uniting government, academia and industry. By 2029, RTIH aims to enable 20,000 startups, create 1,00,000 jobs and establish 10 Centers of Excellence across Andhra Pradesh. Vision To position Andhra Pradesh as a Global Startup Hub for Innovation, Incubation, and Entrepreneurship driving inclusive economic growth. sections.label: Our CEO’s Message
sections.textSample: Our CEO’s Message Andhra Pradesh’s innovation ecosystem stands out through strategic design, inclusive policies, and technology-driven execution. The Ratan Tata Innovation Hub is a flagship initiative of the Government of Andhra Pradesh to accelerate the state’s innovation and startup agenda. We serve as the central platform for entrepreneurs, researchers, and industry leaders to connect, collaborate, and commercialize breakthrough ideas. Our hub-and-spoke model ensures that opportunity reaches beyond big cities into every district of Andhra Pradesh. I invite stakeholders across government, academia, and industry to partner with us in making Andhra Pradesh a model for inclusive innovation. Smt. Dhatri Reddy IAS,CEO, Ratan Tata Innovation Hub

Positioned in a city renowned for its industrial base, IT growth, and educational ecosystem, the spoke is dedicated to driving innovation-led entrepreneurship.Mission & VisionWith the mission of empowering local talent and startups, RTIH Visakhapatnam envisions becoming a leading center for entrepreneurial growth in Andhra Pradesh.Regional StrengthsVisakhapatnam is home to IT companies, large-scale industries, port-based trade, and tourism.

sections.label: What is RTIH?
sections.textSample: What is RTIH?Ratan Tata Innovation Hub is Andhra Pradesh's flagship initiative to transform the state into a global startup hub. Operating on a Hub-and-Spoke model, RTIH at Amaravati acts as the central hub, supported by five regional centers across Visakhapatnam, Vijayawada, Rajahmundry, Tirupati, and Anantapur. Ratan Tata Innovation Hub Designed toNurture innovation and entrepreneurship across the stateConnect startups with markets, research, and government initiativesDrive cutting-edge innovation in AI, biotech, clean energy, advanced manufacturing, and emerging technologiesPromote inclusivity by supporting women, rural innovators, and underrepresented groups

sections.label: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.textSample: Frequently Asked QuestionsEverything you need to know about Ratan Tata Innovation Hub in Andhra Pradesh1. What is Ratan Tata Innovation Hub (RTIH)?−RTIH is a state-wide initiative set up by the Government of Andhra Pradesh to promote innovation, entrepreneurship, and industry–academia collaboration. It acts as a central point of support for startups and innovators.2. What is the vision behind establishing the Ratan Tata Innovation Hub (RTIH)?+The RTIH was established to nurture grassroots innovation, empower entrepreneurs, and create a vibrant startup ecosystem in Andhra Pradesh, with a vision to enable “One Family One Entrepreneur” and honor Ratan Tata’s legacy of innovation and social responsibility.3. Where is RTIH located?+The central hub is set up at Amaravati, with Spokes in Vijayawa
